## Summary
<!-- Brief description of what this PR does and why -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply — these drive semantic versioning -->
- [ ] `feat`: New feature (triggers MINOR version bump)
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix (triggers PATCH version bump)
- [ ] `feat!` / `BREAKING CHANGE`: Breaking change (triggers MAJOR version bump)
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation only (no version bump)
- [ ] `refactor`: Code refactoring (no version bump)
- [ ] `test`: Tests only (no version bump)
- [ ] `chore` / `ci` / `build`: Maintenance (no version bump)
- [ ] `perf`: Performance improvement (triggers PATCH version bump)

## Checklist
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (`<type>: <description>`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass: `pytest tests/`
- [ ] Linting passes: `black ez_appsec/ tests/`
- [ ] Documentation updated as needed

## How Was This Tested?
<!-- Describe the testing you did: unit tests, manual scan on a real repo, Docker build, etc. -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any issues this PR resolves, e.g. "Closes #42" -->
